title: AFK Cinematics
description: A mod that starts cinematic shots when the player goes AFK
body:
The **AFK Cinematic Mod** adds a unique and visually stunning feature to Minecraft. Whenever a player goes **AFK (Away From Keyboard)**, the mod automatically starts **cinematic camera shots** that look like scenes from a movie.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/uIZ7OhacvgI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

> ❤️ _This mod is completely free. If you create a video using this mod, please make sure to properly credit it. Always mention the mod name, its author, and include the official download link in your description or video. This helps support the creator and allows others to easily find and use the mod._

### Turn off this Setting to get Smooth FPS
Make sure to turn off reduce FPS when AFKm, to get unlimited smooth FPS (unlimited e.g. system dependent)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23b4d8358e818f3c5776e2dc63bf13ee1f9d43c7_0.webp)

These smooth camera movements make your gameplay look **cool, dynamic, and professional**, especially useful for content creators or players who just want a more immersive experience.

Documentation - [Visit Wiki Page](https://gameversify.com/afk-cinematics-mod-minecraft/)

---

## 🎬 How It Works

As soon as the player stays inactive for a set amount of time (25 Seconds Default), the mod triggers **automatic cinematic shots**. The camera starts moving around your character, creating a **movie-like effect** without any manual effort.

You can also manually start the cinematic mode anytime using commands.

---

## ⚙️ Commands

Here are the available commands in the mod:

- `/afkc time` — Set the AFK time after which cinematic mode will start  
- `/afkc start` — Start cinematic mode instantly without waiting  
- `/afkc about` — Show information about the mod  
- `/afkc music` — Toggle cinematic music on/off 

---

## ✨ Features

- Automatic cinematic mode when AFK  
- Smooth and movie-like camera movements  
- Manual control with simple commands  
- Perfect for screenshots and content creation  
- Lightweight and easy to use  

---

## 🔥 Recommended for Better Experience

To make the cinematic experience even more immersive, you can use the following:

- **[Complementary Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound)** — Adds realistic lighting and visuals  
- **Music Mods / Background Music** — Enhances the cinematic feel  
- **[Ambient Sound Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds)** — Adds natural environmental sounds  
- **[Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered)** — Realistic sound effects with echo and depth
